sec.compound: amino acids (glutamic acid, histidine, methionine, proline, phenylalanine)

growth_records.cite: Weiss, Anna S. et al. In vitro interaction network of a synthetic gut bacterial community. The ISME Journal (2022). DOI:10.1038/s41396-021-01153-z. [PMC8941000]
growth_records.snippet: intermediate growth rate (GR > 1 h-1, ... B. caecimuris I48 ...) ... Both Bacteroidales strains produced acetic acid, succinic acid as well as branched-chain fatty acids ... In SM of strains M. intestinale YL27 and B. caecimuris I48, elevat
growth_records.notes: growth_rate 1.0 h-1 = lower bound of 'intermediate' bin (exact in Table S2, unavailable). Bacteroidales: acetate + succinate + BCFA; net amino-acid release; acidifies medium. Qualitative (MS); no numeric rates.

growth_records.cite: Pau Pérez Escriva et al. Distinct N and C Cross-Feeding Networks in a Synthetic Mouse Gut Consortium. mSystems (2022). DOI:10.1128/msystems.01484-21. [PMC9040589]
growth_records.snippet: Table 1: Bacteroides caecimuris I48 (Bacteroidetes), Max OD 1.18, Mean μ ± SD 0.47 ± 0.02.
growth_records.notes: μ=0.47 h^-1 (±0.02) reported. td = ln2/μ = 0.6931/0.47 = 1.475 h. Max OD600 = 1.18. Identified as a primary carbon supplier (e.g. succinate) in the consortium's C food web, but no quantitative per-biomass secretion rate given.
